text.font-family: Impact, Haettenschweiler, Arial Black, Arial Narrow, sans-serif

svg.text: Why Is One Punch Man So Strong?
Narrative, psychological, and structural reasons behind Saitama's overwhelming power
B) HOW HE DIFFERS FROM TYPICAL SHONEN HEROES
Saitama was designed to parody power-scaling
stories—his absurd strength is the premise
While others train and climb for years to reach
the top, he begins where most protagonists
His routine is both disciplined and comically extreme:
and a 10 km run every day.
He fights without fear, ego, or hesitation.
No need to prove himself—he's already
Saitama is not just strong in a physical sense.
He works because his power flips the usual
THE STORY NEEDS AN UNBEATABLE HERO
battle-anime formula and turns the real
His power lets the series go beyond battles
to explore boredom, meaning, and identity
One Punch Man is powerful as a character because
his strength is both a joke and a storytelling device.
